commit.message:
Fix terminal toggle hidden behind iOS home indicator

The safe area inset was applied to .input-bar but terminal-panel is the
actual bottom element — so on iPhone the 36px terminal header was behind
the home indicator and invisible.

Fix: remove safe-area-inset-bottom from input-bar, apply it to
terminal-panel so the header sits above the home indicator.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: create plans table before tryAlterPlans ALTER calls

tryAlterPlans was running before CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS plans,
causing 'Table does not exist' crash on first boot with empty DB.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix analemma sonar ping on mobile

SMIL begin="Xs" is relative to document load time, so it fires
before the component mounts if the user navigates to the view
late. Replaced all SMIL <animate> with CSS animations, which
always run relative to element insertion time.

Also exclude SVG elements from the global opacity transition rule
so CSS animations aren't overridden.

repository.name: claude-code-playground
repository.description: playing with claude code and github

commit.message:
security: solbot audit round 2 — 9 fixes across 4 files

Fix 3 critical (spending tracker mutex, Jupiter Ultra budget bypass,
double-close race), 2 high (sell tx data corruption, position count
overflow), 3 medium (DexScreener pair selection, config safety
minimums, metadata parse guard), 1 low (P&L snapshot truncation,
stale cache cleanup).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Full workout system audit: fix 12 critical math errors, 30+ moderate issues, 8 UX fixes

Math fixes across 12 engine files:
- Standardize on Brzycki 1RM formula (was Epley in weight-estimator, Brzycki elsewhere)
- RPE progression now additive in 0.5 increments (was multiplicative producing 7.315, 8.48)
- Weight adjustments in auto-adjust actually applied (was dead code — calculated but dropped)
- Volume individualization implemented (estimateStrengthDelta was stub returning 0/1)
- Fatigue scoring unit-normalized for kg vs lbs (was 2.2x biased against metric users)
- Pause/resume tracks actual pause time (duration was including lunch breaks)
- Consecutive overload detection fixed (was almost never detecting deloads)
- ACWR cold start returns danger not "undertrained" for new user spikes
- Linear volume multiplier capped at 1.15x (was uncapping to 1.30+ on long blocks)
- Split type gets actual sessions/week (was hardcoded 0, always returning full_body)
- calculate1RM guards 0 weight/reps, balanced goal maps to hypertrophy not power

UX fixes:
- Complete Set button fixed at viewport bottom (no more scrolling every set)
- 0-reps validation warning before completing a set
- Workout summary shown in finish modal before feedback survey
- Feedback fields collapsed under "More details" (only session RPE required)
- Rest timer ring uses stored duration (was breaking after exercise advance)
- Set count off-by-one fixed during rest overlay
- Template start requires confirmation (was silently replacing program)
- Template save from history uses real exercise data (was dummy metadata)

Additional fixes: antagonist pairs corrected, Tabata difficulty→advanced,
red-level throttle→25% volume, RPE bump guard removed, striking→both fatigue

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: Dashboard Enhancements 2 — 7 new features + NEW badges

New pages:
- /integrations — real-time health cards for DB, ClickUp, ZIWO, n8n, AI, Zoho
- /notifications — full-page notification centre with filter tabs (replaces bell dropdown)
- /pocs — Customers directory; search, view & edit contacts with linked tickets (admin + agent)

New API routes:
- GET/POST /api/briefing/acknowledge — agent shift acknowledgment
- GET /api/admin/briefing-acks — admin view of who acknowledged today's shifts
- GET /api/metrics/aht — 30-day avg handle time (admin-wide or agent-scoped)
- GET /api/metrics/fcr — 30-day first call resolution rate
- POST /api/admin/sync-call-logs — admin bulk-sync call history from ZIWO callHistory API
- POST /api/calls/sync — agent sync own calls from ZIWO
- GET/PATCH /api/calls/[id] — update individual call log (e.g. link ticket)
- GET /api/pocs — public POC lookup for ZiwoWidget caller screen pop

Features added to existing pages:
- Briefing: Acknowledge Shift button with timestamp; admin Rota shows green/gray ack dots
- Admin Dashboard: AHT and FCR Rate KPI cards
- Agent Dashboard: AHT and FCR tiles + Sync from ZIWO button
- Tickets list: AI risk badge (High/Med/Low) in Priority column; channel tag on ticket title; VIP ⭐ in Reporter col
- Ticket detail: risk badge + channel tag in header; escalation modal with required reason logged to activity thread
- My Tickets: Voice/Email channel filter tabs
- System Logs: Call Logs tab with agent/direction/has-ticket filters and ticket linkage; Sync button
- ZiwoWidget: post-call ticket form with inline POC/org search+create; caller screen pop on incoming calls
- AgentSidebar: Wrap-Up auto-status (2-min countdown) after call hangup; status restored to Available on expiry
- health API: added ZIWO ping + agent count, n8n last run, Zoho not_configured

UI: NewBadge component — "NEW" chip with fixed-position tooltip on all new features and nav links

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Migrate from Vite+React SPA to Next.js App Router for SSG

Google Search Console was not indexing pages because the SPA only rendered
content client-side. Next.js statically generates all 14 routes with full
HTML content, meta tags, and JSON-LD structured data at build time.

- Replace react-router-dom with Next.js App Router
- Add per-page metadata via Next.js metadata API
- Restore FAQ and ImageObject JSON-LD schemas on all blog posts
- Use next/font/google for optimised font loading
- Auto-generate robots.txt and sitemap.xml
- Remove Vite, prerender.js, and old SPA infrastructure

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Claude/mobile responsive design s yhos (#31)

* Make entire webapp fully mobile-responsive while preserving all animations and styling

- Add global CSS fixes: prevent horizontal overflow, iOS zoom prevention on input focus, better tap highlights
- Landing page: responsive text sizes, padding, card layouts, button sizes across Hero, Problem, HowItWorks, Pricing, Partners, FAQ, Waitlist, and TrustBadges sections
- Navbar: move language switcher into mobile menu on small screens, improve logo sizing
- Modals: bottom-sheet pattern on mobile with drag handle, proper max-height and scroll containment
- SurveyModal: bottom-sheet on mobile, responsive text and spacing throughout all 5 steps
- Dashboard: add bottom padding for mobile bottom nav, responsive stat cards and referral code layout
- PetManager: bottom-sheet modal, responsive header with full-width button on mobile
- Admin: responsive KPI cards with smaller text/icons, mobile-friendly pagination
- Auth pages: responsive padding and heading sizes for login and signup forms
- Settings: responsive card padding and heading sizes

https://claude.ai/code/session_01QDjgSwKoRWSCu38Kv6JvuA

* Refine mobile responsiveness and fix slow dashboard navigation

Mobile fixes:
- Constrain mobile sidebar to 80vw max width for small phones
- Increase bottom nav text from 10px to 11px for readability
- Make signup form name fields stack on mobile (grid-cols-1)
- Make pet form birthday/weight fields stack on mobile
- Hide less important table columns on mobile (District, Joined)
- Reduce chart axis label widths and pie chart radii for mobile
- Add responsive padding/text sizing across admin pages

Navigation performance:
- Increase gcTime to 30min so cached data persists during navigation
- Disable refetchOnWindowFocus to prevent unnecessary re-fetches
- Show cached data instantly on dashboard instead of spinner

https://claude.ai/code/session_01QDjgSwKoRWSCu38Kv6JvuA

commit.message:
Add anonymous proxy endpoint and Try It playground

Allows unauthenticated callers to invoke agents via /api/proxy/[slug]
with rate limiting (10 rpm), idempotency keys, input size limits, and
anonymous credit purchasing via Stripe checkout. Playground UI renders
on agent detail pages when an MCP endpoint is configured.

New files:
- /api/proxy/[slug] — synchronous proxy with payment settlement
- /api/proxy/credits — anonymous Stripe checkout (max $5)
- /api/proxy/credits/[checkoutSessionId] — token retrieval
- AgentPlayground.tsx — Try It client component
- Migration 00015 — anonymous_sessions, idempotency_keys tables

Sprint 4f: % DV and unit auto-conversion for micro input fields

- parseMicroInput(key, raw): converts suffixed values on field blur
    4%    → native unit using FDA 2020 DV reference (all micros)
    2mcg  → IU for Vit D  (1 mcg = 40 IU)
    2mg   → IU for Vit D  (1 mg  = 40 000 IU)
- Applied to Custom Entry manual micros and My Foods edit form
- Micro inputs switched from type=number to type=text to allow suffixes
  (macro fields unchanged)
- Tip line added under Custom Entry micros section

DV reference: fiber 28g, vitD 800IU, vitK 120mcg, Mg 420mg, Ca 1300mg,
Zn 11mg, B12 2.4mcg, vitC 90mg, K 4700mg, Fe 18mg, niacin 16mg, vitE 15mg

commit.message:
fix: remove tool names from donation popup text

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: initialize responsive hooks from window to prevent mobile→desktop layout flash (#167)

useResponsiveLayout and useMobileViewport initialized state as false/0,
then updated in useEffect. This caused a first-render mobile layout
followed by immediate desktop re-render. Monaco editor could initialize
during this transition with zero-height container, leaving it permanently
hidden behind overflow-hidden parents.

Fix: use lazy initializer to read window.innerWidth synchronously,
avoiding the layout flash entirely.

commit.message:
Use content-addressed localStorage keys for viewer import

Instead of a generic 'local' key, store models under pflow-model-<sha256>
so the URL contains a content identifier (e.g. /pflow?import=a1b2c3d4).
Keeps base64 URL fallback for backwards compat.

docs(audit): update with comprehensive manual testing results

- Conducted full WCAG 2.1 Level AA compliance testing
- Added real test results: color contrast, keyboard nav, focus indicators, touch targets
- Identified critical Level A violation: missing skip links (WCAG 2.4.1)

- Found 14 touch targets below 44x44px recommendation
- Confirmed prefers-reduced-motion support present
- Changed overall status from "Needs Improvement" to "Non-Conformant Level A"

Add shimmer effect, command history, streaming stderr, footer layout fix

- Shimmer: Orchestrate sidebar row pulses white during decomposition
  with a sweeping light band animation.
- Command history: up/down arrow keys in plan input cycle through
  previously sent messages, like a terminal.
- Streaming stderr: Go backend stderr now streams line-by-line instead
  of buffering until exit, making errors visible in real time.
- Footer layout: DecomposePreviewView footer uses compact chips to
  prevent text wrapping at 420px sheet width.
- PATH fix: Backend process inherits user's full login shell PATH so
  npm/homebrew-installed CLIs (codex, etc.) are findable.

Add ORB width filter to reject narrow-range days

New parameter min_orb_atr_ratio (default 0.3). Breakout signals
are suppressed when orb_width < ATR * ratio, filtering out days
with insufficient volatility expansion in the opening range.

commit.message:
Fix 415 Unsupported Media Type on search index POST

RestTemplate sends Map as application/x-www-form-urlencoded by default.
Wrap in HttpEntity with explicit Content-Type: application/json so the
search service can deserialize the @RequestBody correctly.

Germany's Weimar-era values (equity return 2.6B, inflation 105B) were
destroying chart readability. Fix:
- Ch2: clip returns > 500% to null, use median instead of mean for bar chart
- Ch4: clip inflation/rates > 500% to null
- Apply same clipping in compare mode buildCompareLines

feat: ingestion include default fix & source curation workflow [Stories 7.6, 7.7]

Story 7.6: Change Source.included default from True to False so new ingestion
sources require explicit approval before inclusion.

Story 7.7: Add source curation workflow with strategy pattern
(StorageBackend ABC → GoogleDriveBackend). New SourceCurationService with
upload_to_storage(), check_for_updates(), poll_non_processed() methods.
Three new API endpoints: POST /sources/{id}/upload-to-storage,
POST /sources/sync, GET /sources/{id}/curation-status.

Adds curation_status and last_synced_at columns to Source model,
scheduler job for periodic sync, and integrates curation into
Drive monitor, Gmail poller, and webhook pipelines.

Fix ffmpeg audio analysis failing on Alpine Linux

Replace complexFilter with asplit/anullsink (exit code 218 / ENOSYS on

astats sequentially. Also add stack trace logging to the process route
catch block for better debugging of intermittent errors.
